markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content workflow, new image pipeline, and LLM performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Workflow:** The 5 articles/week cadence is a quality-focused decision, not a simple AI output. It's driven by a human-led workflow that includes manual outline creation, fact-checking, and a full human edit to ensure high quality and SEO effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**LLM Performance:** A Loom video from Erik will explain the dual tracking approach for LLM visibility: Scrunch (a proxy for search presence) and Looker (direct referral traffic). This will clarify how SEO builds the foundation for LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**New Image Pipeline:** GrowthX's new AI image pipeline generates blog illustrations. Brooke will share examples with the You.com design team for feedback and provide brand hex codes to guide the AI's color palette.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Workflow

  - [**Problem:** The 5 articles/week cadence was questioned, as the initial project scope anticipated a 3x production increase from an AI workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [**Solution:** The cadence is a quality-focused decision. The workflow is human-led to prevent the shallow, repetitive content that pure AI generation often produces.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**Workflow Breakdown:**](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
    1.  [**Ideation & Outline (Human):** A human editor researches top-ranking content to create a detailed, SEO-optimized outline. This is a critical step, as a strong outline simplifies all subsequent editing.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
    2.  [**Assignment Brief (AI):** The workflow generates a brief using the SEMrush API for keyword analysis and content structure.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
    3.  [**Research (AI):** The AI gathers information to answer questions from the brief. This step is being upgraded to an agentic researcher that self-evaluates for information gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
    4.  [**Drafting & Fact-Checking (AI):** The AI writes the draft, which is immediately run through a fact-checker. This tool verifies claims against the research document and rewrites unsupported statements (e.g., changing "50% of enterprises use X" to "Industry experts suggest...").](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
    5.  [**Human Edit:** A human editor reads the entire draft to ensure flow, verify stats, correct links, and add internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
    6.  [**Style Validation (AI):** A new final step evaluates the draft against writing guidelines and a proofreading checklist, then automatically fixes any issues.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)

### LLM Performance Tracking

  - [**Problem:** Confusion exists around measuring GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) and how it relates to SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**Solution:** The strategy uses a dual approach to track LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
      - [**Scrunch:** A proxy tool that estimates search presence for target queries.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
      - [**Looker Dashboard:** Tracks direct LLM referral traffic from GA4, showing which LLMs and pages drive visits.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** SEO is the foundation for LLM visibility. Data shows that for clients with large knowledge bases, the vast majority of LLM referral traffic goes to blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [**Third-Party Sites:** The team discussed the role of sites like Reddit and LinkedIn in LLM citations. Erik will provide high-level thoughts on engaging these platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)

### Looker Dashboard Walkthrough

  - [Aida reviewed the Looker dashboard, which pulls data from GA4 and Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [**Key Reports:**](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
      - [**Traffic:** Overall vs. Engaged Sessions (duration \>10s, scroll, or click).](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Page:** GSC data for organic traffic from non-branded queries.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
      - [**Conversion Events:** GA4 data on custom conversion events.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [**Cohort Report:** Will track performance of newly published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
      - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** Shows top LLMs and landing pages driving traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [**Context:** The homepage's 70% engagement rate is likely inflated by logged-in users landing directly on the chat interface, which is tracked under the same URL (`u.com`).](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

### New AI Image Pipeline

  - [GrowthX demoed a new AI image generation pipeline for blog illustrations.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Brooke liked the style and will share examples with the You.com design team.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [**Action:** Brooke will provide brand hex codes. Aida noted the AI can follow a general color palette but struggles with exact hex codes.](https://fathom.video/share/MeoanyPH3tR2-7hck96e613Ui7S1nniP?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
